evidence: "Elvis and Nixon is a great movie; its a mini snapshot of a moment when a big singer met with an electric leader."
"Wow, Harry Bosch has always been an complicated intriguing character."
"It was just okay, it wasn't horrible but it wasn't another great Tarantino film either."
"The whole show is great this season doesn't disappoint."
"perfect pacing, I loved the use of the black and the white; it made it feel more intimate..."
"Wow intriguing show, just watched episode one and I have no doubt it'll be awesome."
"The music was good. The cast was brilliant. The dialogue was good yet in places felt forced."
"Great writing. Lots of twists and turns. Laugh out loud hilarious."
"Usually I love his movies but this one felt like a three hours of hoping something great would come of all the incredible dialogue..."
"I am not going to spoil anything but I just finished the entire season after waiting for what felt like forever and it was worth it!"
"It has that classic wonder years feel with great writing and characters."
"Wow one word 'speechless', loved season one and season two was even more incredible."
"Wow! I was pleasantly surprised, the preview didn't really do the show justice..."
"Ignore the lousy reviews. This is a great movie. Great writing. Great acting. A powerful story."

summary: The user enjoys drama, comedy, and thrillers, with a strong preference for fast-paced narratives and high production quality. They value emotional resonance in their viewing experiences, often expressing strong recommendations for shows and movies they find engaging.
